## Continuous Vacuum Density Flux

[Figure: hydrogen_1_dynamic_flux.png — see manuscript/vol_6_periodic_table/figures/]

**Protium Vacuum Flux.** The continuous, symmetric $1/r$ vacuum strain and flux streamplot generated by a single $6^3_2$ localized topological defect. This isotropic gradient constitutes the classical electrical and gravitational fields.
